node.html: • Robustness and Uncertainty evaluation on Semi-supervised with MixMatch(MixUp) on deep learning architectures, using common perturbations or corruptions exposed on the observations in Chest X-rays medical field.

• Design and develop a software solution in the field of protein molecules structures program.
  • Update and design database and queries to store protein molecules and atoms, schedule automate the download files
  • Software Development Technologies used: Python, Bash Scripting, Linux and PostgreSQL.

• Development of a software solution platform to facilitate data acquisition for ophidian study
  • Technologies used to develop the solution includes; React, Node.js, Flutter, PostgreSQL and Python.
